debug_info.goal:
A : Type u
inst✝⁵ : CommRing A
inst✝⁴ : IsNoetherianRing A
inst✝³ : @HeightOneLocalizationIsPID A inst✝⁵
M : Type u_1
inst✝² : AddCommGroup M
inst✝¹ : Module A M
inst✝ : Module.Finite A M
hMT : IsTorsion A M
⊢ ∃ ι x p,
    ∃ (_ : ∀ (i : ι), (p i).asIdeal.primeHeight = 1),
      ∃ e, ∃ (_ : ∀ (i : ι), 0 < e i), M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] ((i : ι) → A ⧸ (p i).asIdeal ^ e i)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
set s := (Module.support A M) ∩ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1}
  have hfs : s.Finite := Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support hMT
  rcases s.eq_empty_or_nonempty with hse | hsn
  · use PEmpty, inferInstance, PEmpty.elim, PEmpty.elim, PEmpty.elim, PEmpty.elim
    refine ⟨0, (LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT (fun _ => 0) 0).mpr ?_⟩
    simp [s, hse]
  · set S := ⨅ p ∈ s, p.asIdeal.primeCompl
    let hPID := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization s (by simp [s]) hsn hfs
    haveI : IsDomain (Localization S) := hPID.1
    haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing (Localization S) := hPID.2
    have hMT' : Module.IsTorsion (Localization S) (LocalizedModule S M) := by
      rw [Module.isTorsion_iff_forall_isLocalization_at_zero]
      intro; rw [LocalizedModule.isLocalization_at_zero_of_isTorsion hMT]; exact Subsingleton.elim _ _
    obtain ⟨ι, hι, pS, hpS, hneS, e, he, ⟨equiv⟩⟩ := Module.equiv_directSum_of_isTorsion (LocalizedModule S M) hMT'
    let p i : PrimeSpectrum A := ⟨Ideal.comap (algebraMap A (Localization S)) (pS i), (pS i).is_prime_comap _⟩
    let N := (i : ι) → A ⧸ (p i).asIdeal ^ e i
    have hp i : (p i).asIdeal.primeHeight = 1 := by
      have : (p i).asIdeal.IsPrime := (p i).2
      rw [Ideal.primeHeight_comap_localization_iInf_primeCompl s hfs]
      exact IsPrincipalIdealRing.isMaximal_main (hpS i) (hneS i)
    have hNT : Module.IsTorsion A N := Module.IsTorsion.pi fun i =>
      Module.IsTorsion.quotient_power_of_primeHeight_one (hp i) (he i)
    obtain ⟨fS, hfS⟩ := (LocalizedModule.linearMapPhi S M N).surjective
      (equiv.toLinearMap.comp (DirectSum.linearEquivFunOnFintype (Localization S) ι _).symm.toLinearMap)
    obtain ⟨f, s', rfl⟩ := LocalizedModule.mk_surjective S fS
    use ι, hι, p, hp, e, he, f
    rw [LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT hNT f]
    have h_bi : Function.Bijective ((LocalizedModule.linearMapPhi S M N) (LocalizedModule.mk f s')) := by
      rw [hfS]; exact (equiv.toLinearMap.comp (DirectSum.linearEquivFunOnFintype _ _ _).symm).bijective
    have h_unit : IsUnit (algebraMap (Localization S) (Localization S) (1 / (algebraMap A (Localization S) s'))) := by
      apply isUnit_of_mul_eq_one _ (algebraMap A (Localization S) s'); simp
    rw [LocalizedModule.linearMapPhi_mk, ← LinearMap.smul_right_apply, LinearMap.smul_def] at h_bi
    exact (Function.bijective_smul_iff (IsLocalization.map_units (Localization S) s')).mp h_bi
